## Constitution: Code Quality (I. Code Quality Standards)

- [ ] CHK001 All code passes linting with zero warnings
- [ ] CHK002 No deprecated APIs or language features used
- [ ] CHK003 Code duplication refactored into reusable functions
- [ ] CHK004 Functions >50 lines have complete docstrings (parameters, return types)
- [ ] CHK005 Comments explain *why*, not *what*—code is self-documenting
- [ ] CHK006 Variable/function names are descriptive and use finance domain terminology
- [ ] CHK007 PR code review approved on quality by maintainer

## Constitution: User Experience Consistency (II. UX Consistency)

- [ ] CHK008 Feature follows FinWise interaction patterns (docs/design-system.md)
- [ ] CHK009 Financial terminology used consistently (e.g., "portfolio", "rebalance")
- [ ] CHK010 Error messages are user-friendly and actionable
- [ ] CHK011 Loading/success/error states identical across platforms (web, mobile, API)
- [ ] CHK012 API responses match data structure for same operation across clients
- [ ] CHK013 User-facing changes documented in /docs/user-guide/
- [ ] CHK014 Accessibility verified (WCAG 2.1 AA minimum)

## Constitution: Performance Requirements (III. Performance)

- [ ] CHK015 API p95 latency ≤500ms (standard), ≤2s (complex portfolio analysis)
- [ ] CHK016 UI interactions respond within 100ms (perceived responsiveness)
- [ ] CHK017 Mobile startup time <2s (iPhone 12+, Pixel 6+)
- [ ] CHK018 Memory usage within limits (Web <100MB, Mobile <150MB)
- [ ] CHK019 Background services complete within scheduled windows
- [ ] CHK020 Database queries indexed; no full table scans on tables >100k rows
- [ ] CHK021 Performance tests included (load tests, profiling)
- [ ] CHK022 No performance regressions (>10% slower than previous release)

## [Custom Category 1]

- [ ] CHK023 Custom checklist item
- [ ] CHK024 Feature-specific requirement

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
